raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 1376 will assist veterans with cybersecurity employment.",
    "The bill will help veterans with previous cybersecurity experience and a security clearance transition to civilian jobs.",
    "Assembly Bill 1376 requires the California Department of Veteran Affairs to collaborate with state agencies for veterans' employment in cybersecurity.",
    "The bill mandates a preference system for veterans applying for cybersecurity jobs requiring a security clearance.",
    "State agencies hiring for cybersecurity positions are required to establish a uniform hiring policy for veterans with security clearance backgrounds.",
    "The bipartisan support for Assembly Bill 1376 indicates recognition of veterans as an important asset in California's cybersecurity workforce."
  ]
}
